name: Chinese Silk Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the apples and core them, cutting into wedges about 1/2 inch thick.
2. Whip the egg whites until frothy.
3. Add flour and cornstarch to the egg whites and beat into a smooth batter.
4. Heat peanut oil in a deep fryer or heavy skillet to 375°F (190°C).
5. Dip each apple wedge into the egg white batter, then place them in the hot oil and fry, turning occasionally, until crisp and brown. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
6. In a saucepan, bring sugar, honey, and water to a boil. Cook to a hard ball stage (280°F or 138°C) on a candy thermometer.
7. Pour the syrup over the apple wedges immediately and serve hot, accompanied by a large crystal bowl filled with ice cubes and water for dipping.
This recipe serves 6.
